# Transcript
ONA
*WRIKO**
OY EPI QATERA QH*
N PERI GOMFWI KAI D
TOICOY LIQOYS ENI D
WN EPISTYLIA * EPIQ
NPLHROYNTA APAN TO C
* LIQOIN KATA TO METAST
TON EXERGASAMENOS AKOL
AYTO EIDOS KAI MEGEQOS TO
NOIS SYNQHSEI DE TOYS ARM
LIOY EPI PALASTHN ARMOT
EI PERI GOMFOIN SIDH
N ARMON EKASTON
*I ENI MHKOS PAL
YLOIS PAC
Y * DOKO
I DH**
